lessons.titleTgt: スーパーで

dialogue.t: —こんにちは、ユキさん！どこへ行きますか？
dialogue.en: Hi, Yuki! Where are you going?
dialogue.lit: Hello, Yuki-san! Where to go (question)?
dialogue.r: Konnichiwa, Yuki-san! Doko e ikimasu ka?

dialogue.t: —スーパーへ行きます。やさいとくだものがほしいです。
dialogue.en: I'm going to the supermarket. I want vegetables and fruit.
dialogue.lit: Supermarket to go. Vegetable and fruit (subject) want is.
dialogue.r: Sūpā e ikimasu. Yasai to kudamono ga hoshii desu.

dialogue.t: —いいですね。りんごもほしいですか？
dialogue.en: Nice. Do you want apples too?
dialogue.lit: Good is right. Apple also want is (question)?
dialogue.r: Ii desu ne. Ringo mo hoshii desu ka?

dialogue.t: —はい、りんごもほしいです。りんごは、いくつありますか？
dialogue.en: Yes, I want apples too. How many apples are there?
dialogue.lit: Yes, apple also want is. Apple (topic), how-many exists (question)?
dialogue.r: Hai, ringo mo hoshii desu. Ringo wa, ikutsu arimasu ka?

dialogue.t: —たくさんありますよ。みっつ、ほしいですか？
dialogue.en: There are a lot. Do you want three?
dialogue.lit: Many exists (emphasis). Three, want is (question)?
dialogue.r: Takusan arimasu yo. Mittsu, hoshii desu ka?

dialogue.t: —はい、みっつ、おねがいします。
dialogue.en: Yes, three, please.
dialogue.lit: Yes, three, please-do.
dialogue.r: Hai, mittsu, o-negai shimasu.

dialogue.t: —やさいは、なにがほしいですか？
dialogue.en: What vegetables do you want?
dialogue.lit: Vegetable (topic), what (subject) want is (question)?
dialogue.r: Yasai wa, nani ga hoshii desu ka?

dialogue.t: —わかりません。すみません、もういちど、ゆっくり、おねがいします。
dialogue.en: I don't know. Sorry, one more time, slowly, please.
dialogue.lit: Don't-understand. Excuse-me, one more time, slowly, please-do.
dialogue.r: Wakarimasen. Sumimasen, mō ichido, yukkuri, o-negai shimasu.

dialogue.t: —やさいは、なにが、ほしい、ですか？
dialogue.en: What... vegetables... do you want?
dialogue.lit: Vegetable (topic), what (subject), want, is (question)?
dialogue.r: Yasai wa, nani ga, hoshii, desu ka?

dialogue.t: —あ、わかりました！やさいは、ぜんぶほしいです。
dialogue.en: Oh, I understand! I want all the vegetables.
dialogue.lit: Ah, understood! Vegetable (topic), all want is.
dialogue.r: A, wakarimashita! Yasai wa, zenbu hoshii desu.

dialogue.t: —ぜんぶですか？すごいですね！ぜんぶで、いくらですか？
dialogue.en: All of them? That's amazing! How much in total?
dialogue.lit: All is (question)? Amazing is right! All in, how-much is (question)?
dialogue.r: Zenbu desu ka? Sugoi desu ne! Zenbu de, ikura desu ka?

dialogue.t: —せんえんです。やすいですよ。
dialogue.en: It's 1000 yen. It's cheap.
dialogue.lit: Thousand-yen is. Cheap is (emphasis).
dialogue.r: Sen-en desu. Yasui desu yo.

yourTurn.t: やさいとくだものがほしいです。
yourTurn.en: I want vegetables and fruit.

yourTurn.t: りんごはいくつほしいですか？みっつ、おねがいします。
yourTurn.en: How many apples do you want? Three, please.

yourTurn.t: ぜんぶで、いくらですか？せんえんです。
yourTurn.en: How much in total? It's 1000 yen.

lessons.titleTgt: てんきは どうですか？

dialogue.t: —こんにちは！きょうのてんきは、どうですか？
dialogue.en: Hi! How's today's weather?
dialogue.lit: Hello! Today 's weather (topic), how is (question)?
dialogue.r: Konnichiwa! Kyō no tenki wa, dō desu ka?

dialogue.t: —あめです。すごくさむいです。
dialogue.en: It's raining. It's really cold.
dialogue.lit: Rain is. Very cold is.
dialogue.r: Ame desu. Sugoku samui desu.

dialogue.t: —あめですか？かさがほしいですね。
dialogue.en: It's raining? I want an umbrella.
dialogue.lit: Rain is (question)? Umbrella (subject) want is right.
dialogue.r: Ame desu ka? Kasa ga hoshii desu ne.

dialogue.t: —はい、かさが、ここにありますよ。どうぞ。
dialogue.en: Yes, there's an umbrella right here. Here you go.
dialogue.lit: Yes, umbrella (subject), here at exists (emphasis). Please-take.
dialogue.r: Hai, kasa ga, koko ni arimasu yo. Dōzo.

dialogue.t: —ありがとう！あしたのてんきも、あめですか？
dialogue.en: Thanks! Is tomorrow's weather rain too?
dialogue.lit: Thanks! Tomorrow 's weather also, rain is (question)?
dialogue.r: Arigatō! Ashita no tenki mo, ame desu ka?

dialogue.t: —いいえ、あしたははれです。でも、さむいですよ。
dialogue.en: No, tomorrow is sunny. But it's cold.
dialogue.lit: No, tomorrow (topic) sunny is. But, cold is (emphasis).
dialogue.r: Iie, ashita wa hare desu. Demo, samui desu yo.

dialogue.t: —はれですか！よかったです。
dialogue.en: Sunny? I'm glad.
dialogue.lit: Sunny is (question)! Was-good is.
dialogue.r: Hare desu ka! Yokatta desu.

dialogue.t: —でも、なつは、あついですよ。すごく、あついです。
dialogue.en: But summer is hot. Really hot.
dialogue.lit: But, summer (topic), hot is (emphasis). Very, hot is.
dialogue.r: Demo, natsu wa, atsui desu yo. Sugoku, atsui desu.

dialogue.t: —あついコーヒーがほしいですか？それとも、つめたいコーヒー？
dialogue.en: Do you want hot coffee? Or cold coffee?
dialogue.lit: Hot coffee (subject) want is (question)? Or-else, cold coffee?
dialogue.r: Atsui kōhī ga hoshii desu ka? Sore tomo, tsumetai kōhī?

dialogue.t: —きょうはさむいから、あついコーヒーがほしいです。
dialogue.en: Since it's cold today, I want hot coffee.
dialogue.lit: Today (topic) cold because, hot coffee (subject) want is.
dialogue.r: Kyō wa samui kara, atsui kōhī ga hoshii desu.

yourTurn.t: てんきは、どうですか？あめです、さむいです。
yourTurn.en: How's the weather? It's raining, it's cold.

yourTurn.t: あしたは、はれですか？はい、はれです。
yourTurn.en: Is tomorrow sunny? Yes, sunny.

yourTurn.t: あついコーヒーがほしいです、さむいから。
yourTurn.en: I want hot coffee, because it's cold.

lessons.titleTgt: みちを きいて

dialogue.t: —すみません、えきは、どこですか？
dialogue.en: Excuse me, where's the station?
dialogue.lit: Excuse-me, station (topic), where is (question)?
dialogue.r: Sumimasen, eki wa, doko desu ka?

dialogue.t: —えきですか？ここから、ちかいですよ。
dialogue.en: The station? It's close from here.
dialogue.lit: Station is (question)? Here from, close is (emphasis).
dialogue.r: Eki desu ka? Koko kara, chikai desu yo.

dialogue.t: —よかったです。みちは、わかりません。
dialogue.en: Good. I don't know the way.
dialogue.lit: Was-good is. Way (topic), don't-understand.
dialogue.r: Yokatta desu. Michi wa, wakarimasen.

dialogue.t: —まっすぐ、行きます。それから、みぎへまがります。
dialogue.en: Go straight. Then, turn right.
dialogue.lit: Straight, go. After that, right to turn.
dialogue.r: Massugu, ikimasu. Sore kara, migi e magarimasu.

dialogue.t: —まっすぐ、それから、みぎですか？
dialogue.en: Straight, then right?
dialogue.lit: Straight, after that, right is (question)?
dialogue.r: Massugu, sore kara, migi desu ka?

dialogue.t: —はい。みぎへまがって、それから、ひだりです。
dialogue.en: Yes. Turn right, and then it's left.
dialogue.lit: Yes. Right to turning, after that, left is.
dialogue.r: Hai. Migi e magatte, sore kara, hidari desu.

dialogue.t: —すみません、ゆっくり、もういちど、おねがいします。
dialogue.en: Sorry, slowly, one more time, please.
dialogue.lit: Excuse-me, slowly, one more time, please-do.
dialogue.r: Sumimasen, yukkuri, mō ichido, o-negai shimasu.

dialogue.t: —まっすぐ。… みぎ。… それから、ひだり。えきは、そこです。
dialogue.en: Straight. ... Right. ... Then, left. The station is there.
dialogue.lit: Straight. … Right. … After that, left. Station (topic), there is.
dialogue.r: Massugu. … Migi. … Sore kara, hidari. Eki wa, soko desu.

dialogue.t: —わかりました！ありがとう、ケンさん。
dialogue.en: Got it! Thanks, Ken.
dialogue.lit: Understood! Thanks, Ken-san.
dialogue.r: Wakarimashita! Arigatō, Ken-san.

dialogue.t: —どういたしまして。とおくないですよ。
dialogue.en: You're welcome. It's not far.
dialogue.lit: How did-(I)-do. Not-far is (emphasis).
dialogue.r: Dō itashimashite. Tōkunai desu yo.

yourTurn.t: えきは、どこですか？ちかいです。
yourTurn.en: Where's the station? It's close.

yourTurn.t: まっすぐ行きます。それから、みぎへまがります。
yourTurn.en: Go straight, then turn right.

yourTurn.t: みちは、わかりません。ゆっくり、おねがいします。
yourTurn.en: I don't know the way. Slowly, please.

lessons.titleTgt: あたらしい ともだち

dialogue.t: —ケンさん、こちらはタロウさんです。
dialogue.en: Ken, this is Taro.
dialogue.lit: Ken-san, this-one (topic) Taro-san is.

dialogue.t: —はじめまして、タロウさん。わたしはケンです。
dialogue.en: Nice to meet you, Taro. I'm Ken.
dialogue.lit: First-time, Taro-san. I (topic) Ken is.
dialogue.r: Hajimemashite, Tarō-san. Watashi wa Ken desu.

dialogue.t: —はじめまして、ケンさん。よろしくおねがいします。
dialogue.en: Nice to meet you, Ken. Pleased to meet you.
dialogue.lit: First-time, Ken-san. Well please-do.
dialogue.r: Hajimemashite, Ken-san. Yoroshiku o-negai shimasu.

dialogue.t: —タロウさんは、がくせいですか？
dialogue.en: Taro, are you a student?
dialogue.lit: Taro-san (topic), student is (question)?
dialogue.r: Tarō-san wa, gakusei desu ka?

dialogue.t: —いいえ、がくせいじゃないです。せんせいです。
dialogue.en: No, I'm not a student. I'm a teacher.
dialogue.lit: No, student is-not. Teacher is.
dialogue.r: Iie, gakusei ja nai desu. Sensei desu.

dialogue.t: —せんせいですか！すごいですね。なんさいですか？
dialogue.en: A teacher? That's amazing. How old are you?
dialogue.lit: Teacher is (question)! Amazing is right. How-many-years-old is (question)?
dialogue.r: Sensei desu ka! Sugoi desu ne. Nansai desu ka?

dialogue.t: —にじゅうはっさいです。ケンさんは？
dialogue.en: I'm 28. And you, Ken?
dialogue.lit: Twenty-eight-years-old is. Ken-san (topic)?
dialogue.r: Nijū-hassai desu. Ken-san wa?

dialogue.t: —わたしも、にじゅうはっさいです！おなじですね。
dialogue.en: I'm 28 too! Same age.
dialogue.lit: I also, twenty-eight-years-old is! Same is right.
dialogue.r: Watashi mo, nijū-hassai desu! Onaji desu ne.

dialogue.t: —おなじですか！じゃあ、ともだちですね。
dialogue.en: Same? Then, we're friends.
dialogue.lit: Same is (question)! Well, friend is right.
dialogue.r: Onaji desu ka! Jā, tomodachi desu ne.

dialogue.t: —はい、ともだちです。よろしくおねがいします、タロウさん。
dialogue.en: Yes, friends. Pleased to meet you, Taro.
dialogue.lit: Yes, friend is. Well please-do, Taro-san.
dialogue.r: Hai, tomodachi desu. Yoroshiku o-negai shimasu, Tarō-san.

yourTurn.t: こちらはタロウさんです。せんせいです。
yourTurn.en: This is Taro. He's a teacher.

yourTurn.t: なんさいですか？にじゅうはっさいです。
yourTurn.en: How old are you? I'm 28.

yourTurn.t: おなじですね！じゃあ、ともだちですね。
yourTurn.en: Same age! Then, we're friends.

dialogue.lit: Straight go. After that, right to turn. Not-far is (emphasis).

dialogue.t: —ありがとう！スーパーも、ちかいですか？
dialogue.en: Thanks! Is the supermarket close too?
dialogue.lit: Thanks! Supermarket also, close is (question)?
dialogue.r: Arigatō! Sūpā mo, chikai desu ka?

dialogue.t: —はい、スーパーも、えきもちかいです。やさいが、やすいですよ。
dialogue.en: Yes, both the supermarket and the station are close. The vegetables are cheap.
dialogue.lit: Yes, supermarket also, station also close is. Vegetable (subject), cheap is (emphasis).
dialogue.r: Hai, sūpā mo, eki mo chikai desu. Yasai ga, yasui desu yo.

dialogue.lit: Well, together go (question)? I also, stomach emptied is.

yourTurn.t: きょうのてんきは、いいです。はれです。

yourTurn.t: えきは、ちかいです。まっすぐ行きます、それから、みぎです。

yourTurn.t: いっしょに行きますか？わたしも、おなかがすいたです。

lessons.titleTgt: ジムで

dialogue.t: —タロウさん、ここでうんどうしますか？
dialogue.en: Taro, do you exercise here?
dialogue.lit: Taro-san, here at exercise do (question)?
dialogue.r: Tarō-san, koko de undō shimasu ka?

dialogue.t: —はい、ジムで、まいにちうんどうします。
dialogue.en: Yes, I exercise at the gym every day.
dialogue.lit: Yes, gym at, every-day exercise do.
dialogue.r: Hai, jimu de, mainichi undō shimasu.

dialogue.t: —すごいですね！からだが、つよいですか？
dialogue.en: Amazing! Is your body strong?
dialogue.lit: Amazing is right! Body (subject), strong is (question)?
dialogue.r: Sugoi desu ne! Karada ga, tsuyoi desu ka?

dialogue.t: —まだ、つよくないです。でも、がんばります。
dialogue.en: Not yet strong. But I'll do my best.
dialogue.lit: Still, strong-is-not. But, will-do-my-best.
dialogue.r: Mada, tsuyokunai desu. Demo, ganbarimasu.

dialogue.t: —わたしも、うんどうがしたいです。いっしょに、がんばりますか？

dialogue.lit: I also, exercise (subject) want-to-do is. Together, do-our-best (question)?
dialogue.r: Watashi mo, undō ga shitai desu. Issho ni, ganbarimasu ka?

dialogue.t: —はい！いっしょに、がんばりましょう。
dialogue.en: Yes! Let's do our best together.
dialogue.lit: Yes! Together, let's-do-our-best.
dialogue.r: Hai! Issho ni, ganbarimashō.

dialogue.t: —ジムは、ここからちかいですか？
dialogue.en: Is the gym close from here?
dialogue.lit: Gym (topic), here from close is (question)?
dialogue.r: Jimu wa, koko kara chikai desu ka?

dialogue.t: —はい、すごくちかいです。とおくないですよ。
dialogue.en: Yes, really close. It's not far.
dialogue.lit: Yes, very close is. Not-far is (emphasis).
dialogue.r: Hai, sugoku chikai desu. Tōkunai desu yo.

dialogue.t: —よかったです。じゃあ、いま行きましょう！
dialogue.en: Great. Then let's go now!
dialogue.lit: Was-good is. Well, now let's-go!
dialogue.r: Yokatta desu. Jā, ima ikimashō!

yourTurn.t: まいにち、うんどうしますか？はい、ジムでうんどうします。

yourTurn.en: Not yet strong. But I'll do my best.

yourTurn.t: いっしょに、がんばりましょう！
yourTurn.en: Let's do our best together!

lessons.titleTgt: でんわで

dialogue.t: —もしもし、ユキさんですか？
dialogue.en: Hello, is this Yuki?
dialogue.lit: Hello-hello, Yuki-san is (question)?
dialogue.r: Moshi moshi, Yuki-san desu ka?

dialogue.lit: Yes, later at, please-do.
dialogue.r: Hai, ato de, o-negai shimasu.

dialogue.t: —わかりました。だいじょうぶです。あとで、でんわします。
dialogue.en: Got it. No problem. I'll call later.
dialogue.lit: Understood. Okay is. Later at, phone will-do.
dialogue.r: Wakarimashita. Daijōbu desu. Ato de, denwa shimasu.

dialogue.t: —ありがとう、ケンさん。また あとで。
dialogue.en: Thanks, Ken. Talk later.
dialogue.lit: Thanks, Ken-san. Again later at.

dialogue.t: —また あとで！がんばってくださいね。

dialogue.lit: Again later at! Please-do-your-best right.
dialogue.r: Mata ato de! Ganbatte kudasai ne.

yourTurn.t: もしもし、ケンさんですか？はい、そうです。
yourTurn.en: Hello, is this Ken? Yes, that's right.

lessons.titleTgt: かいしゃで

yourTurn.en: Good night, everyone. I hope tomorrow is a good day too.

lessons.titleTgt: ありがとう、これまでも、これからも
lessons.titleEn: Thank you, until now and from now on

dialogue.t: —はじめて あったひ、おぼえてる？「はじめまして」って、いったね。
dialogue.en: Do you remember the day we first met? We said 'nice to meet you,' didn't we.
dialogue.lit: First-time met day, remembering? 'First-time' quote, said right.
dialogue.r: Hajimete atta hi, oboeteru? 'Hajimemashite' tte, itta ne.

dialogue.t: —うん、あのとき、にほんごが、ぜんぜん、わからなかった。でも、いまは、こうやって、はなせる。
dialogue.en: Yeah, back then I didn't understand Japanese at all. But now, I can speak like this.
dialogue.lit: Yeah, that time, Japanese (subject), not-at-all, didn't-understand. But, now (topic), this-way doing, can-speak.
dialogue.r: Un, ano toki, nihongo ga, zenzen, wakaranakatta. Demo, ima wa, kō yatte, hanaseru.

dialogue.t: —コーヒーから、はじまって、りょこうも、しごとも、こいも、ぜんぶ、あったね。
dialogue.en: Starting from coffee, there was travel, work, love, all of it, wasn't there.
dialogue.lit: Coffee from, beginning, travel also, work also, love also, all, existed right.
dialogue.r: Kōhī kara, hajimatte, ryokō mo, shigoto mo, koi mo, zenbu, atta ne.

dialogue.t: —けんかも、なかなおりも、わかれの くうこうも、サプライズの さいかいも。
dialogue.en: Fights too, making up too, the airport farewell too, the surprise reunion too.
dialogue.lit: Fight also, reconciliation also, farewell 's airport also, surprise 's reunion also.
dialogue.r: Kenka mo, nakanaori mo, wakare no kūkō mo, sapuraizu no saikai mo.

dialogue.t: —みんな、それぞれの みちを、あるいてきた。でも、いつも、ここに、もどってきた。
dialogue.en: Everyone has walked their own path. But we always came back here.
dialogue.lit: Everyone, each-respective 's path (object), walking came. But, always, here to, returning came.
dialogue.r: Minna, sorezore no michi o, aruite kita. Demo, itsumo, koko ni, modotte kita.

dialogue.t: —なかまが、いたから、ここまで、これたんだと思う。ひとりじゃ、むりだった。
dialogue.en: I think I could come this far because I had companions. Alone, it would've been impossible.
dialogue.lit: Companion (subject), existed because, here until, could-come (explanatory) that think. Alone is-not, impossible was.
dialogue.r: Nakama ga, ita kara, koko made, koretan da to omou. Hitori ja, muri datta.

dialogue.t: —これまでも、ありがとう。そして、これからも、よろしく。
dialogue.en: Thank you for until now. And, please continue to be good to me from now on too.
dialogue.lit: Until-now also, thanks. And-then, from-now-on also, please-be-good.
dialogue.r: Kore made mo, arigatō. Soshite, kore kara mo, yoroshiku.

dialogue.t: —うん。たびは、おわらない。あたらしい にちじょうが、また、はじまるだけ。みんなで、いこう。
dialogue.en: Yeah. The journey doesn't end. A new everyday simply begins again. Let's go, all together.
dialogue.lit: Yeah. Journey (topic), doesn't-end. New everyday-life (subject), again, only-begins. Everyone with, let's-go.
dialogue.r: Un. Tabi wa, owaranai. Atarashii nichijō ga, mata, hajimaru dake. Minna de, ikō.
